examples: Defence of the realm is crucial.
In the realm of olfaction, we must make do with descriptions and recollections.
Smirks, raised eyebrows, and quizzical looks are not out of the realm of possibility.
It is indeed a fabulous realm of maharajas and their majestic forts and lavish palaces.
Their ancestors are still found throughout Namibia, especially in the remote desert realm of the southern Namib.
